item.title: Error Bounds of Imitating Policies and Environments (NeurIPS 2020)
item.description: This blog summarizes our work of error bounds of imitating policies and environments, which is presented at NeurIPS 2020.

item.title: Efficient Exploration by Novelty Pursuit (DAI 2020)
item.description: This blog summarizes our work of efficient exploration by novelty pursuit, which is presented at DAI 2020.

item.title: Self-Guided Evolution Strategies with Historical Estimated Gradients (IJCAI 2020)
item.description: This blog summarizes our work of self-guided evolution strategies with historical estimated gradients, which is presented at IJCAI 2020.

item.title: Presentation
item.description: Talks [2021-04-22] Zeroth order methods using adaptive smoothing parameters. The first doctoral and postdoctoral forum of Shenzhen Research Institute of Big Data. (Best Paper Oral Presentation Award) [2020-10-24] Efficient exploration by novelty pursuit. DAI 2020, online. [slides] Paper Reading My paper reading presentation at the following seminars: RL Group at CUHKSZ, Deep Learning Group at CUHKSZ and Prof. Tom Luo's Group Meeting. [2021-06-11] On the linear convergence of policy gradient methods for finite MDPs.

item.title: Publication
item.description: My publication profile at Google Scholar. * indicates the equal contribution. [2021] Tian Xu, Ziniu Li, Yang Yu. Error Bounds of Imitating Policies and Environments for Reinforcement Learning. To appear in IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI), 2021. Ziniu Li, Yingru Li, Hao Liang, Tong Zhang. Efficient Exploration by HyperDQN in Deep Reinforcement Learning. Reinforcement Learning for Real Life Workshop @ ICML 2021. [paper] [poster]

item.title: Teaching
item.description: I was a teaching assistant for the following courses. FTE4560: Basic Machine Learning. 2021 Spring, CUHKSZ. MAT3007: Introduction to Optimization. 2020 Fall, CUHKSZ.
